content.query:
CREATE VIEW [M3_GLAnalytics] AS
SELECT   M3_FGLEDG.CONO
        ,M3_FGLEDG.DIVI
        ,M3_FGLEDG.YEA4
        ,M3_FGLEDG.JRNO
        ,M3_FGLEDG.JSNO
        ,M3_FGLEDG.TRCD
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VSER
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VONO
        ,M3_FGLEDG.FEID
        ,M3_FGLEDG.FNCN
        ,M3_FGLEDG.TDSC
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VDSC
        ,M3_FGLEDG.EICD
        ,M3_FGLEDG.ACDT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.OCDT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.REDE
        ,M3_FGLEDG.RECO
        ,M3_FGLEDG.ERDT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VATD
        ,M3_FGLEDG.TOCD
        ,L1.AICL AccountGroup
        ,M3_FGLEDG.AIT1
        ,AIT1+' - '+L1.TX40 Dimension1
        ,M3_FGLEDG.AIT2
        ,AIT2+' - '+L2.TX40 Dimension2
        ,M3_FGLEDG.AIT3
        ,AIT3+' - '+L3.TX40 Dimension3
        ,M3_FGLEDG.AIT4
        ,AIT4+' - '+L4.TX40 Dimension4
        ,M3_FGLEDG.AIT5
        ,AIT5+' - '+L5.TX40 Dimension5
        ,M3_FGLEDG.AIT6
        ,M3_FGLEDG.AIT7
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VTXT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.ACQT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.DCQT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.UNIT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.ACAM
        ,M3_FGLEDG.DCAM
        ,M3_FGLEDG.DBCR
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CUCD
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CRTP
        ,M3_FGLEDG.ARAT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CUAM
        ,M3_FGLEDG.TGCD
        ,M3_FGLEDG.THCC
        ,M3_FGLEDG.TCRT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.TCAR
        ,M3_FGLEDG.TCAM
        ,M3_FGLEDG.AT04
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VTCD
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VTP1
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CVT1
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VTP2
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CVT2
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CVT3
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CVT4
        ,M3_FGLEDG.BSCD
        ,M3_FGLEDG.FTCO
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VATR
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VRNE
        ,M3_FGLEDG.SERS
        ,M3_FGLEDG.ARCD
        ,M3_FGLEDG.GFL1
        ,M3_FGLEDG.GFL2
        ,M3_FGLEDG.GFL3
        ,M3_FGLEDG.GFL4
        ,M3_FGLEDG.GFL5
        ,M3_FGLEDG.TXID
        ,M3_FGLEDG.RGDT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.RGTM
        ,M3_FGLEDG.LMDT
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CHNO
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CHID
        ,M3_FGLEDG.APCD
        ,M3_FGLEDG.APRV
        ,M3_FGLEDG.ECAR
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VRNO
        ,M3_FGLEDG.LMTS
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VSNO
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VTPQ
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VTD1
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CRAU
        ,M3_FGLEDG.CRAY
        ,M3_FGLEDG.MIGI
        ,M3_FGLEDG.VOTP
        ,M3_FGLEDG.RERF
        ,M3_FGLEDG.RRCB

FROM M3_FGLEDG LEFT JOIN M3_FCHACC L1 on M3_FGLEDG.AIT1=L1.AITM and L1.AITP=1
               LEFT JOIN M3_FCHACC L2 on M3_FGLEDG.AIT2=L2.AITM and L2.AITP=2
               LEFT JOIN M3_FCHACC L3 on M3_FGLEDG.AIT3=L3.AITM and L3.AITP=3
               LEFT JOIN M3_FCHACC L4 on M3_FGLEDG.AIT4=L4.AITM and L4.AITP=4
               LEFT JOIN M3_FCHACC L5 on M3_FGLEDG.AIT5=L5.AITM and L5.AITP=5
